author: Didi
install_msg: Thanks for installing the APOD cog! Use `[p]apodset` to configure the channel and posting time.
name: APOD
short: NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day
description: Fetches and posts NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day manually or on a daily schedule per server.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level APOD settings including channel IDs, post times, include-info toggle, API key, and role IDs for scheduled pings.
